title: Prospect Opportunities
description: The opportunities for a prospective student at an institution.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the prospect opportunity.

prospect.title: Prospect
prospect.description: The person who is interested in attending the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Prospect.

recruitAcademicPrograms.title: Recruit Academic Programs
recruitAcademicPrograms.description: The person who is interested in attending the institution and the academic program(s) they are considering at the institution.

items.title: Recruit Academic Programs
items.description: The person who is interested in attending the institution and the academic program(s) they are considering at the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Recruit Academic Programs.

entryAcademicPeriod.title: Entry Academic Period
entryAcademicPeriod.description: The academic period the prospect is interested in beginning attendance at the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Entry Academic Period.

academicLoad.title: Academic Load
academicLoad.description: The academic load selection, e.g., full- or part-time

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

admissionPopulation.title: Admission Population
admissionPopulation.description: The admission population the prospect would be included within at the institution if they attend the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Admission Population.

site.title: Site
site.description: The institution site (campus) the prospect is considering.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Site.

opportunitySource.title: Opportunity Source
opportunitySource.description: The source associated with the prospect opportunity.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Opportunity Source.

educationalGoal.title: Educational Goal
educationalGoal.description: The educational goal associated with the prospect opportunity.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Educational Goal.

careerGoals.title: Career Goals
careerGoals.description: The career goals associated with the prospect opportunity.

items.title: Career Goals
items.description: The career goals associated with the prospect opportunity.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Career Goals.
